meta_desc: Experience the best of Kerala with our 5-day premium family tour covering Munnar

day_5_plan: Early morning Periyar Tiger Reserve bamboo rafting and jungle safari.
day_6_plan: Visit local elephant camps and organic spice farms in Kumily.
day_7_plan: Transfer safely back down the hills to Kochi Airport for departure.
